title: Lukas-vanilla-pack
description:
This is the pack I use in vanilla,
You can download it if you want the same experience
body:
# Mod pack features

This is a pretty basic modpack with many optimization mods and quality-of-life mods. The vanilla in the title only refers to it being playable on a vanilla server.

Download my resource pack here: [vanillatweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#4FX7fy)

# Looking for a server?
Get BisectHosting and save 25% off for new customers using code Lukas at checkout. Thanks for your support - it helps me develop this and other mods I make! #ad
[![Support me](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ca44e941-2306-414c-8c65-7c50bc6fcf48.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/Lukas)
# Mods and credits
**Please check them out if you are interested**
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - Adds connected textures
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - Adds a minimap in the corner
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - Config mod
- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) - Support for custom entity models
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) - New animations for all mobs
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - Changes the handling of culling to improve performance
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Loads the game faster
- [Hey Wiki](https://modrinth.com/mod/hey-wiki) - You easily get a wiki article for a block or an entity
- [Simple Elytra Hud](https://modrinth.com/mod/simpleelytrahud) - A elytra HUD
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) - lets you see Optifine and Laby mod capes
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) - Increases the maximum length of chat history.
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) - A better F3
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) - Voice chat mod
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Config mod
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - Optimization mod.
-  [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - Adds texture features for entitys. 
- [Stendhal](https://modrinth.com/mod/stendhal) - Enchants visual utilities for books, signs, anvil and the in-game chat.
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Alternative Options Menu for Sodium
- [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) - Adds controller support
- [Solas Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader/version/2.1) - Cool shaders
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Food/hunger-related HUD improvements 
- [MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib) - A library mod
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) - Cool shaders 2
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - library mod
- [Super Duper Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/shader/super-duper-vanilla) - Cool shaders 3
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background or idle.
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) - Allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - Adds a full screen map
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - Reduce block entity FPS lag
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Library mod
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Library mod
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - Adds extra features to sodium
- [BSL Shaders - Original](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) - Cool shaders 4
- [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) - Cool shaders 5
- [AudioPlayer](https://modrinth.com/mod/audioplayer) - Put your own audio files on music discs!
- [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) - Fast Nvidia only rendering engine for sodium (Only works for Nvidia cards)
- [MiniHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud) - Adds overlays for a lot of things. (I only use it for shulker boxes preview)
- [NBT Autocomplete](https://modrinth.com/mod/nbt-autocomplete) - Adds suggestions for NBT tags in commands
- [White Nametags](https://modrinth.com/mod/white-nametags) - Changes all nametags to white text and removes black background
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - A modern shader pack loader
- [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) - A client-side schematic mod with extra features for creative mode work
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api) - library mod
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - A mod to optimize the Minecraft networking stack
- [Entity View Distance](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-view-distance) - This mod allows more precise manipulation of entity view distance
- [Wavey Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wavey-capes) - Wavey capes, so cool
- [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels) - Cool shaders 6
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - library mod
- [Format](https://modrinth.com/plugin/format) - A worldlike tool to generate NBT and JSON areas 
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Mod menu, to see all your mods :)
- [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) - Open a LAN server to anyone, anywhere, anytime.
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) - Makes chat unreportable (where possible)
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimizations
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - A zoom mod
- [Auth Me](https://modrinth.com/mod/auth-me) - Authenticate yourself and re-validate your session
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - Render the player skin layer in 3d!
- [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) - Very good build tool.
- [flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) - Record your Minecraft gameplay, play it back and create stunning cinematic shots
- [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) - Adds a configurable numerical ping display to the player list
- [Bucket-Pickup](https://modrinth.com/mod/bucket-pickup) - An mod that lets you pick a bucket from your inventory when you shift + pick block when looking at lava/water
- [Command Block IDE](https://modrinth.com/mod/command-block-ide) - Replaces the command block GUI to allow editing multiple command blocks at once
- [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) - A client-side schematic mod with extra features for creative mode work
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod
- [Trusted skin pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/trusted-skin-pack) - Everyone in Trusted SMP has their skin model they can place down
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - Re-implements MCPatcher's CIT (custom item textures from optifine resource packs)
- [Dramatic Skys](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dramatic-skys) - texture pack that adds in a lot of new skyboxes
- [FabricSkyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes) - Allows resource packs to define custom skyboxes.
- [Bookshelf Inspector](https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-inspector) - Inspect any book in a chiseled bookshelf.
- [FPS - Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/fpsdisplay/version/4.2.1+1.21.1) - A simple Fabric mod that displays the current FPS on screen.
- [Not Enough Pages](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-pages) - Paste text across pages in books!
- [Lexikon](https://modrinth.com/mod/lexikon) - This mod acts as an in-game spell checker, highlighting errors and suggesting corrections as you type in Minecraft chat
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - A dynamic lights mod for Fabric.
- [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) - With vanilla tweaks you can create your own super cool texture pack and the included one is the tweaks I use. 
- [Voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy) - A Level of Detail rendering mod
